song.title: My Redeemer Lives
song.presentation: V1 V2 P C V1 V2 P C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I know He rescued my soul His blood has covered my sin I believe, I believe [v2] 2) My shame He's taken away My pain is healed in His name I believe, I believe [p] Pre-Chorus I'll raise a banner 'Cause my Lord has conquered the grave [c] Chorus My Redeemer lives My Redeemer lives My Redeemer lives My Redeemer lives [b] Bridge You lift my burdens I’ll rise with You I'm standing on this mountain top To see Your kingdom come
[E] 1) I know He rescued my soul His blood has covered my sin I believe, I believe 2) My shame He's taken away My pain is healed in His name I believe, I believe Pre-Chorus I'll raise a banner 'Cause my Lord has conquered the grave Chorus My Redeemer lives, My Redeemer lives My Redeemer lives, My Redeemer lives Bridge You lift my burdens I’ll rise with You I'm standing on this mountain top To see Your kingdom come
